wiki.summary: “you ready?”, originally dubbed “Polkadot”, is the opening track to early life crisis. On the ethereal track, Nettspend sets up the album by asking listeners if they’re ready for what they’re about to experience, even repeating the phrase in the chorus and ad-libs. The track was first revealed publicly on October 5, 2025, through an Instagram Story posted by Nettspend. It was later previewed during one of his live performances on January 22, 2026, which showed part of the track’s chorus. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “you ready?”, originally dubbed “Polkadot”, is the opening track to early life crisis. On the ethereal track, Nettspend sets up the album by asking listeners if they’re ready for what they’re about to experience, even repeating the phrase in the chorus and ad-libs. The track was first revealed publicly on October 5, 2025, through an Instagram Story posted by Nettspend. It was later previewed during one of his live performances on January 22, 2026, which showed part of the track’s chorus. Finally, it was performed one last time on February 16, 2026 during the early life crisis listening party, which would reveal the full track. “you ready?” by Nettspend was produced by CXO. Nettspend released “you ready?” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
